name: Nelson Chauke
bio: Nelson Chauke is the founder, principal agent and managing director of Nelson Chauke Properties, a Pretoria-based estate agency formally registered on 20 October 2020. Public records and major property portals show the agency actively marketing houses, apartments and small commercial properties across Pretoria and surrounding suburbs, operating openly under his name. With more than 20 years’ sales experience in the local real-estate market, Nelson specialises in residential and commercial stock across Pretoria East and neighbouring areas. He is known for deep local market knowledge, a client-focused approach and the ability to guide buyers and sellers through transactions. Nelson maintains a visible, client-facing presence on listing platforms and social media. No definitive public employment record links him to Rawson Property Group; available evidence confirms his role as director of his own agency and his active work in the Pretoria property market.

name: John Bishop
bio: John leads the sales team in Pretoria, focusing on results-driven strategies and mentorship. He excels at identifying investment opportunities and negotiating complex deals. Clients value his straightforward approach and dedication. His expertise covers Pretoria East, Menlyn, Hatfield, and Centurion.

name: Samantha Grey
bio: Samantha is a top-performing agent with a passion for the Pretoria East property market. She is known for her exceptional client service, strong negotiation skills, and ability to match buyers with homes in suburbs like Garsfontein, Faerie Glen, and Menlyn. Her professional yet approachable demeanor makes the buying or selling process smooth for clients.

name: David Chen
bio: David specialises in family homes across Pretoria and Centurion. With over 15 years living and working in the area, he offers unmatched local knowledge. He helps clients find properties in family-friendly suburbs with good schools, amenities, and long-term investment potential.

name: Zanele Mthembu
bio: Zanele focuses on investment properties across Pretoria and Gauteng, helping clients identify rental opportunities and portfolio growth options. She is particularly knowledgeable about high-demand areas near universities, business hubs, and transport nodes, providing guidance on maximizing returns and managing long-term investments.
